metadata.description: Interior architecture studio — design-automation plugins for a Los Angeles General-B contracting firm.

plugins.name: interior-architect-studio
plugins.description: Drafts 2D plans (FreeCAD), builds & renders 3D (Blender/EEVEE), turns photos/PDFs into renders/elevations/3D, sources materials, and produces BOMs and client decks. Interviews the designer first to lock intent. Portable across machines.
